name: fable-it
description: Make your model behave like Fable — autonomous delivery orchestrator for Claude Code, model-adaptive for Sonnet 5 and Opus 4.8. Invoke with a goal and a numbered Definition of Done; it runs the whole job to completion by conducting the bundled launch, iterate, full-qa and chrome-cdp-control skills, enforcing a 5-gate catalog (turn-end, claim, state-change, phase-boundary, delegation), disk-backed run state, an evidence ledger that makes VERIFIED a lookup, a fresh-context verifier, cost-aware delegation routing with escalate-on-struggle, and optional fail-open hardened-mode hooks.
